# Hook-firing classification (S4 / contract D6)

<!-- GENERATED by bin/sable-hook-matrix. Regenerate with: `bin/sable-hook-matrix --emit-doc docs/HOOK-FIRING-CLASSIFICATION.md`. Do not hand-edit the table. -->

The decidable record that retires t7fm-family folklore. Every hook-firing outcome below is classified as **in-our-control** or **upstream** from two independent observers — the neutral control hook (D2, fire count `C`) and the instrumented trace lib (D1, `STDIN_BYTES` per fire) — diffed against the session-transcript `tool_use` count `T` (ground truth). No cell is left unclassified (totality).

## Decision rules (research F6)

| Signature | Classification | Bucket |
|---|---|---|
| `C == T` and `STDIN_BYTES=0` on all fires | empty-stdin degradation (#16047) | upstream |
| `C < T` (control misses transcript calls) | genuine non-dispatch (#6305/#15441) | upstream |
| `C < T`, non-fire confined to Agent-subagent | Agent-subagent non-dispatch WONTFIX (#34692) | upstream |
| `C < T`, miss scales with concurrent-call count | parallel-batch drop (#64237) | upstream |
| `C == T` and `STDIN_BYTES>0` | healthy dispatch | in-our-control |
| `C > T` (control over-fires the surface) | over-fire anomaly | in-our-control |

## Matrix cells

Dimensions: **session-type x hook-surface x load x permission-mode**. `prov` = provenance: `real` (hooks really invoked in an isolated scratch dir), `modeled` (a known upstream signature not hermetically reproducible in CI — ground truth synthetic, said so here), `detection-only` (attributed from live trace, not asserted green).

## Totality

All **9** cells classified: **4 in-our-control**, **5 upstream**. Every verdict maps to exactly one bucket; no unclassified cell. Enforced by `bin/test_sable_hook_matrix.py::test_totality_over_synthetic_grid`.

## Acknowledged gap (S4-E3 / D5 boundary)

The **session-age>2h** cell is **DETECTION-ONLY**: the #16047 empty-stdin degradation manifests only after a long-lived session ages, which is not hermetically reproducible in CI. Per the D5 boundary it is *detected* here (session-age is in the D1 trace schema) and attributed from live trace-log data rather than asserted green; session rotation is delegated to SABLE-ke3l. This gap is recorded, not hidden.
